title: trifolium tumens
intro: Trifolium tumens, also known as the inflated clover, is a perennial legume species that belongs to the pea family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium tumens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Trifolium tumens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
